name: unreal-engine-mcp
description: Control Unreal Engine 5.5+ through AI with natural language. Build incredible 3D worlds and architectural masterpieces using MCP. Create entire towns, medieval castles, modern mansions, challenging mazes, and complex structures with AI-powered commands.
description_ja: 自然言語 AI で Unreal Engine 5.5 以降を操作。MCP を使って壮大な 3D ワールドや建築の傑作を構築。AI コマンドで街全体・中世の城・モダンな邸宅・迷路・複雑な構造物を生成
